findings: Duplicate system: app/orchestration and app/domains/workflow both exist.
Redundant models: app/db/models and app/infrastructure/models split.
CRITICAL: Password authentication failed for 'postgres' during validation.
Test connection mismatch: .env uses 'ai_content_dev', alembic.ini uses 'ai_content_intel'.
Deterministic execution and resume from checkpoint verified.
Agent communication and prompt construction verified.
JSON parsing with fallback recovery verified.
Error handling and transient failure retries verified.
End-to-End Pipeline Mocked: All 7 stages (Research -> Finalizer) successful.
Multiple content types (Blog, Technical, News, etc.) validated.
Event bus publish/subscribe and wildcard support verified.
Transactional outbox and Janitor zombie detection logic verified.
Dockerfile with multi-stage best practices found.
Docker-compose with healthchecks and dependencies verified.
